SEARCH
Module com.example.progettosw
Package View.CLI

Class StationMatrix

java.lang.Object
View.CLI.StationMatrix
public class StationMatrix extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    StationMatrix()
    this method is the constructor where the matrix StationPrint is initiated.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addCardsToStation(CardPlaying[][] station, int max)
    this method adds the cards to the station matrix, so that they can be printed. 40x40 is the position of the starting card
    void
    addCardToStation(CardResource card, int i, int j, boolean[] voidPositions)
    this method adds a card resource to the station. distanceXFromStarting and distanceYFromStarting are the distances, respectively from the x and y coordinates of the starting card.
    void
    addCardToStation(CardStarting card, int i, int j, boolean[] voidPositions)
    this method adds a starting card to the station.
    void
    initializeStationPrint()
    this method initializes the matrix stationPrint with the coordinates for card placement
    void
    printPoints(ClientBoard clientBoard)
    this method prints the point of the players
    void
    printResources(int fungi, int plant, int animal, int insect, int quill, int manuscript, int inkwell)
    this method prints the resources of station of the player
    void
    printStation(HashMap<ArrayList<Integer>,CardPlaying> playingStationMap)
    this method prints the station of a player distant ato most by max from the starting card. 120 to 122 and 280 to 286 is the position of the starting card.
    void
    printStationTest()
     

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • StationMatrix

      public StationMatrix()
      this method is the constructor where the matrix StationPrint is initiated.

  • Method Details

    • initializeStationPrint

      public void initializeStationPrint()
      this method initializes the matrix stationPrint with the coordinates for card placement

    • addCardToStation

      public void addCardToStation(CardResource card, int i, int j, boolean[] voidPositions)
      this method adds a card resource to the station. distanceXFromStarting and distanceYFromStarting are the distances, respectively from the x and y coordinates of the starting card. If a corner from the card that is added is covered by some other card, the corner doesn't get added to the station what is in that corner.
      Parameters:
      card - is the card resource to be added
      i - is the row coordinate
      j - is the column coordinate

    • addCardToStation

      public void addCardToStation(CardStarting card, int i, int j, boolean[] voidPositions)
      this method adds a starting card to the station.
      Parameters:
      card - is the starting card to be added
      i - is the row of the card
      j - is the column of the card

    • printStation

      public void printStation(HashMap<ArrayList<Integer>,CardPlaying> playingStationMap)
      this method prints the station of a player distant ato most by max from the starting card. 120 to 122 and 280 to 286 is the position of the starting card.
      Parameters:
      playingStationMap - is the distance between the starting card and the furthest card in the station

    • printStationTest

      public void printStationTest()

    • addCardsToStation

      public void addCardsToStation(CardPlaying[][] station, int max)
      this method adds the cards to the station matrix, so that they can be printed. 40x40 is the position of the starting card
      Parameters:
      station - is a matrix of cards
      max - is the distance between the starting card and the furthest card played in the station

    • printResources

      public void printResources(int fungi, int plant, int animal, int insect, int quill, int manuscript, int inkwell)
      this method prints the resources of station of the player
      Parameters:
      fungi - is the counter of fungis in the station
      plant - is the counter of plants in the station
      animal - is the counter of animals in the station
      insect - is the counter of insects in the station
      quill - is the counter of quills in the station
      manuscript - is the counter of manuscripts in the station
      inkwell - is the counter of inkwells in the station

    • printPoints

      public void printPoints(ClientBoard clientBoard)
      this method prints the point of the players
      Parameters:
      clientBoard - is the board of the client needed to get the points.
